banner.title: Reserve your table at Ruchi's.
banner.subtitle: Planning a family dinner, birthday party, or special gathering? Let us set the perfect table for you.

experiences.title: Three ways to dine with us.
experiences.subtitle: Whether it's a quiet dinner or a grand celebration — we have the perfect setting.

items.name: Family Dining
items.summary: Our main dining hall with comfortable seating and full menu access.

items.name: Party Hall
items.summary: A separate room for private celebrations and gatherings.

items.name: Rooftop Dining
items.summary: Open-air dining with a relaxed evening atmosphere.

form.title: Tell us about your reservation.
form.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you shortly to confirm your booking.
form.promise: We respond to every request. For immediate assistance, call us at +91 9964-544555.

items.title: Request received
items.description: Your details reach our team — we check availability for your preferred date and time.

items.title: Confirmation call
items.description: We call or message you to confirm your table, discuss any special requirements or party arrangements.

items.title: You're all set
items.description: Arrive on the day and enjoy your meal — your table will be ready and waiting.

items.title: We see you at sundown
items.description: Your evening begins the moment you step through the door.
